title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 13–16 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Violet, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #17, Unknown person #18 as sanji becomes entangled with Violet while Law’s Green Bit exchange collapses into a trap involving Doflamingo and Fujitora.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Strawhat Crew Member With a Bounty of 77 Million Berries ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: BLACK LEG SANJI... WE'LL BE TAKING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Your head!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hierro Lagrima

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: MeKU- JIRA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Wait, big sis!!

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: Violet- Chan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...Don't worry about me....!! Just get out of here... Black leg!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: ...I knew it. Doflamingo's men used you against your will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We know all about what you people are doing here

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: to believe in an enemy, from the bottom of your heart

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're really a shame of a man....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Thank you for before... you made me so happy....

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I don't understand the CIRCUM- stances, but you don't really want to work for Doflamingo, right!?...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "I mean, you went this far!! So why not escape from this island, on our ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Look this way, black leg

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: From the moment you brought Caesar to this island... you've been falling right into his trap

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: "A trap!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Take a look inside my head

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is a memory from this morning, on Dressrosa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Your majesty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: PLEASE DON'T TELL US YOU RE- SIGNED!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: DOFLA- MINGO- SAMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Please explain this!! Why Abdicate the throne!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The citizens sure are noisy. Isn't CPO here yet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: There's a government ship in the harbor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's Cipher Pol *Aegis" Zero"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They're officials who answer directly to the world nobles!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But why come here ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Calm yourselves, people of dressrossa

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: In regards to the reported matter of Doflamingo's addiction and relinquishment of the title of Shichibuki

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That was a mistake.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: A faulty report.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Still, the world will not be informed of this

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Until a special edition at 3 o'clock today

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So until then, Mum's the word!!! Exposing this information is strictly for- Bidden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Citizens, please proceed calmly...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: as if nothing had happened at all

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Someone really

summary: Pages 13–16 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
